chunks.title: Introduction to Job
chunks.reason: Establishes Job's character, family, wealth, and daily devotion.

chunks.title: The Heavenly Council
chunks.reason: Depicts the conversation between Yahweh and Satan regarding Job's faith.

chunks.title: The Arrival of Calamities
chunks.reason: Chronicles the four messengers reporting Job's sudden losses.

chunks.title: Job's Response
chunks.reason: Describes Job's physical reaction, his prayer of acceptance, and the narrator's conclusion.
